instructions: 1. Combine and mix the almond powders in the middle-sized pot of dust sugar and egg white.
2. Veuuml;rürüs thoroughly cook.
3. Sumixed hereönemated thread, orproduct noses.
4. Wait to cool the mixture with the spatula tip.
5.  O arada da limon suyunu ekleyin.
6. The latest coolant blend is to wipe the cream bag and wipe the oily tray on more magic and not intermittent.
7. Öpreheated from the oven of 160 degrees, cook about 20-25 minutes by check.
8. After processing product moistened with a dump cloth and wait for up to 20 minutes.
9. You can put your t&uuml after cooling our mats.
10.  Afiyet olsun.

make-teriyaki-chicken-poke-bowl-step-by-.name: Make Teriyaki Chicken Poke Bowl: Step By Step
make-teriyaki-chicken-poke-bowl-step-by-.original_name: Haz poke bowl de pollo teriyaki: paso a paso

ingredients.item: 1 small shingle or chili ((titrate with spicy))
Salsa teriyaki, (suficiente para impregnar la pechuga)

instructions: Put the 2 ½ cups of water into a pot with a pint of salt. When water starts to boil, we add 1 cup of whole rice. Cooking at medium heat for about 25 minutes or till the rice's soft and absorbed all water. Reserve.
In a large frying pan, add some oil and soften the chopped garlic and glove and incorporates the previously washed and shredded kale, scattering slightly.
Roast with 100 ml of white wine and let cook till the wine evaporate, till the kale is soft and well seasoned.
Impresses chicken breast with teriyaki sauce, covering completely.
Put the breast into an oven and baker at 200ºC for about 15 minutes or until well cooked and caramelized by the salsa.
At a big bowl, place an integral rice base. On the rice, add hot kale on one side and tiyaki chicken cut into strips on another. Enjoy!

make-this-barley-water-with-lemon-super-.name: Make This Barley Water With Lemon, Super
make-this-barley-water-with-lemon-super-.original_name: Haz esta agua de cebada con limón, súper fácil
instructions: Remoja la cebada de 4 a 8 horas para que se hidrate.
Pasado ese tiempo, lava muy bien y ponla en una olla con los dos litros de agua.
Cocina a fuego medio por aproximadamente 30 a 40 minutos.
Once boiled, put the barley water down and save it.
Let water stand at room temperature and once cold, pour the lemon juice.
Add sugar or sweetener to your taste and mix very well. It rectifies with flavour.
Incorporates ice cubes into your glass and pits the barley water with lemon.
Enjoy!

malted-black-and-white-milkshake.name: Malted Black And White Milkshake

ingredients.item: Ba's best hot fudge or prepared hot fudge

ingredients.prep: for serving; optional but highly recommended

instructions: Place two 8-oz. glasses in freezer and chill 30 minutes.
Let ice cream sit at room temperature 5–10 minutes to soften slightly.
Meanwhile, mix fudge and 1 Tbsp. cream in a small bowl until smooth, silky, and pourable.

Scoop ice cream into a blender. Add malted milk powder and remaining ¼ cup cream and purée, stopping to tamp down ice cream as needed, until smooth but very thick (if you blend for too long, mixture will warm up and become soupy).

Drizzle inside of each chilled glass with about 2 Tbsp. fudge mixture so fudge is running down the sides and pooling in the bottom of the glass. Divide milkshake between glasses. Drizzle each with remaining fudge mixture, then sprinkle with malted milk balls, if using.

mango-lime-shredded-chicken-tacos.name: Mango-lime Shredded Chicken Tacos
instructions: Place chicken in a large pot, cover with water, and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to medium-low; simmer until chicken is no longer pink in the center, about 30 minutes. Transfer chicken to a cutting board; cool then shred.

Heat canola oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion, Anaheim pepper, jalapeño pepper, and garlic; cook and stir until slightly softened and fragrant, about 8 minutes. Add shredded chicken, chicken stock, tomatoes, tomato sauce, mango, lime juice, lime zest, cilantro, chili powder, cumin, sea salt, black pepper, sugar, and cinnamon; bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low; simmer until reduced, at least 45 minutes.
Fill corn tortillas with chicken filling.

marbled-semifreddo-teleculinaria.name: Marbled Semifreddo
instructions: Melt the chocolate and butter in a sea bath. Beat the yolks with the sugar. Boil the milk and add yarn to the yolks, always beating. Add the chocolate and let it cool.

Put the gelatin leaves in gravy and melt them in a little water in the microwave without letting it boil. Beat the cream in whipped cream and add the condensed milk, vanilla essence and melted gelatin, always stirring.

Brush with margarine a round shape of lateral opening. Crush the cookies until you get a powder and sprinkle the shape. Pour some of the cream, then spread, with the help of a spoon the chocolate cream. With the help of a fork, gently stir the prepared to mix the two creams slightly and give the marble effect. Take it to the cold until solidify.
Decorate with chocolate chips and physalis to taste. Keep it cold until it's time to serve.

marinated-manchego-with-orange-preserve.name: Marinated Manchego With Orange Preserve

ingredients.item: Toasted baguette or other crusty bread

instructions: Heat oven to 350°. Cut ¼" off top of garlic bulb and place on a sheet of foil. Drizzle with oil; season with salt. Wrap tightly in foil and bake until skin is golden brown and cloves are tender, 35–40 minutes. Let cool. Squeeze cloves into a large bowl.

Meanwhile, cut ¼" off top and bottom of orange and cut lengthwise into quarters. Remove flesh from each quarter, not including white pith, from peel in 1 piece (save peels). Squeeze juice from flesh into a small bowl; set aside. Cut peel into ¼" pieces and place in a small saucepan; pour in cold water to cover by 1". Bring to a boil then drain; repeat process twice more to remove bitterness. Return orange peels to saucepan and add sugar, reserved orange juice, and ½ cup water. Bring to a boil; reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until peels are soft and liquid is syrupy, 20–30 minutes. Let orange preserve cool.
Add orange preserve, Manchego, rosemary, thyme, and remaining 1½ cups oil to bowl with garlic and gently toss to combine. Cover and chill at least 12 hours.
Bring marinated Manchego to room temperature before serving with bread.
Do Ahead: Manchego can be marinated 5 days ahead. Cover and chill.

marrakesh-express-mezcal-and-pomegranate.name: Marrakesh Express (mezcal And Pomegranate Cocktail)

ingredients.item: To 1 teaspoon harissa paste (such as dea)
ingredients.prep: depending on how spicy you want it
cracked pink peppercorns, and flaky salt (black, smoked, or Maldon), to garnish

instructions: Combine mezcal, pomegranate juice, lemon juice, simple syrup, harissa, rose water, and aquafaba in a cocktail shaker and shake vigorously without ice for 20 seconds to emulsify. Add ice, reseal shaker, and shake until chilled and foamy, about 30 seconds. Strain into an ice-filled rocks glass. Garnish with a sprinkle of pomegranate seeds, cracked pink peppercorns, and flaky salt.

For 1:1 simple syrup, add equal parts sugar and hot water in a resealable mason jar. Seal and shake vigorously, until sugar is dissolved. Let cool before using and store for up to several weeks in the fridge.

meat-soup-with-egg-lemon-rice-argiro.name: Meat Soup With Egg-lemon Rice
instructions: We chop the vegetables with a knife.
Wash the meat first and place it in a pot.
Add water to cover it and let it simmer until it softens well.
Sometimes we skimp it.
When the meat softens, add the vegetables finely chopped and let them boil for 20 minutes.
If you need water, fill in the stew.
Add the rice, salt and pepper.
Allow the rice to burst for 12-15 minutes.
Then beat the egg and dilute it with some broth from the food.
Place it in the pot and shake from the handles.

meatball-sub-boats.name: Meatball Sub Boats
instructions: In a large bowl, combine the ground beef, eggs, bread crumbs, ¼ cup (10 g) parsley, 3 cloves garlic, salt, and pepper.
Shape the ground beef mixture into golf ball-sized balls.
Heat a cast-iron pan or skillet with oil over medium-high heat.
Cook the meatballs until browned on all sides. Transfer meatballs to a plate then remove pan from heat.
Preheat oven to 177°C (180°C).
Place the soft rolls in a baking sheet.
Cut the top of the rolls with a knife and press the inside down to create a boat.
Mix together the melted butter, 3 cloves garlic, and 2 tablespoons of parsley.
Brush the rolls with the garlic butter.
Bake for 5 minutes, or until toasted.
Place two slices of mozzarella in the rolls. Place a spoonful of marinara on top of the cheese.
Place three meatballs in the boat and top with more marinara.
Bake for 25 minutes, or until cheese is melted.
Top with Parmesan.
Enjoy!

meatloaf-muffins-with-bbq-sauce.name: Meatloaf Muffins With Bbq Sauce
instructions: Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C). Brush a 12-cup muffin tin with vegetable oil.
Combine onion and bell pepper in a food processor. Pulse until finely chopped.
Whisk egg and milk together in a small bowl. Mix barbecue sauce, salsa, and Worcestershire sauce together in a separate bowl.
Combine ground sirloin, onion-pepper mixture, bread crumbs, and steak seasoning in a large bowl. Add egg mixture and 1/2 of the barbecue mixture. Mix with your hands until well combined.
Use an ice cream scoop to fill the prepared muffin cups with the meat mixture. Top each mini loaf with a spoonful of the remaining barbecue mixture.
Bake in the preheated oven until no longer pink in the center, about 20 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read at least 71°C (70 degrees C).

mediterranean-quinoa-salad.name: Mediterranean Quinoa Salad

ingredients.item: Cooked chicken breasts - cut into bite size pieces

instructions: Bring water, bouillon cubes, and garlic to a boil in a saucepan. Stir in quinoa; reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until quinoa is tender and water has been absorbed, 15 to 20 minutes.
Discard garlic clove and transfer quinoa into a large bowl.
Add chicken, onion, bell pepper, olives, feta cheese, parsley, chives, and salt to quinoa; drizzle lemon juice, balsamic vinegar, and olive oil on top. Stir until evenly mixed.
Serve warm or refrigerate and serve cold.

melon-ice-cream-teleculinaria.name: Melon Ice Cream
instructions: Peel and cut the melon into pieces and crush it with the magic wand until it is puree.
Light a pot with water, sugar and 5 or 6 leaves of mint roughly cut and let it boil, in mild heat, for 6 minutes. Add the melon puree and cook, always stirring, in a light, for 5 minutes. Remove.
Put it in a bowl and take it to the freezer. Move the prepared every 30 minutes until solidified. Remove and serve with mint leaves.
Peel and cut the melon into pieces and crush it with the magic wand until it is puree.
Light a pot with water, sugar and 5 or 6 leaves of mint roughly cut and let it boil, in mild heat, for 6 minutes. Add the melon puree and cook, always stirring, in a light, for 5 minutes. Remove.
Put it in a bowl and take it to the freezer. Move the prepared every 30 minutes until solidified. Remove and serve with mint leaves.

memphis-bbq-pork-totchos.name: Memphis Bbq Pork Totchos

ingredients.prep: such as Extra Crispy Tater Tots®

instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).
Arrange potato nuggets in a single layer on a baking sheet.

Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes. Shake the baking sheet and continue baking until potato nuggets are extra crispy, 20 to 24 minutes more. Remove the baking sheet from the oven and turn on the broiler.
Top potato nuggets with pepper Jack cheese, pulled pork, onion, and jalapeño peppers. Drizzle barbecue sauce over 'totchos'.
Broil in the preheated oven until cheese starts to bubble, 5 to 7 minutes. Top 'totchos' with coleslaw and green onions.

mexican-chili-tacos-teleculinaria.name: Mexican Chili Tacos
instructions: In a pot place the onion and garlic teeth previously peeled and chopped, the olive oil and bring to the fire until golden. Add the minced meat, season salt and stir until the meat gets color.

Wash the malaguet, open it in half, remove the seeds and pinch it. Add the spaghetti to the pot, as well as the tomato pulp. Finally, add the beans with the broth, and let it cook, stirring from time to time until it is cooked and refined.
Retire do lume separe o preparado pelos tacos, decore a gosto e sirva por exemplo acompanhado com arroz branco.

miki-noodles.name: Miki Noodles

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or  0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Mix 3¾ cups plus 1 Tbsp. (477 g) all-purpose flour and 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt in a large bowl to combine.
Whisk 1 large egg, 1 large egg yolk, ¼ cup vegetable oil, ½ tsp. food-grade lye water, and ⅔ cup plus 3 Tbsp. water in a medium bowl to combine.

Make a well in the center of dry ingredients and pour in egg mixture. Using your hands or a wooden spoon, incorporate dry ingredients until a shaggy dough comes together; mix in up to 1 Tbsp. more water if any patches of dry flour remain. Transfer dough to a lightly floured surface and knead until smooth and cohesive, 8–10 minutes. Cover with plastic wrap and let rest at room temperature 10 minutes and up to 1 hour.

Divide dough in half. Working with 1 half and keeping remaining half covered, roll out dough on a lightly floured surface into a long, narrow ⅛"–¼"-thick rectangle. Dust lightly with flour. Starting at a short end, fold dough into thirds (do not to press too firmly; you want to keep dough from sticking to itself). Cut into ¼"-wide ribbons with a sharp knife. Gently unfurl ribbons and transfer to a lightly floured rimmed baking sheet. Repeat with remaining half of dough.

Cook noodles in a large pot of boiling water until tender, 8–10 minutes. Drain.
Do Ahead: Dough can be made 1 day ahead. Wrap in plastic and chill. Bring to room temperature before using.

minced-meat-with-fried-banana-teleculina.name: Minced Meat With Fried Banana

ingredients.item: Folhas de salsa ou coentros para decorar

instructions: Descasque e pique a cebola e os alhos; descasque e corte a cenoura em cubos; limpe os pimentos de sementes e pique com uma faca. Refogue tudo numa frigideira com um pouco de azeite.

Light another pot with some olive oil, let it warm up, add the rice and let it fry a little, stirring. Add twice the rice in water, season with salt and let cook, in medium light, with the pot slightly covered.

Add the minced meat to the braised meat and let it shine. Season it with salt, pepper, oregano, cumin and blond leaf. Water with white wine and let it evaporate. Then add the tomato pulp and let it cook a little. In the end, add the olives and capers and let me see.

Peel the bananas and cut them in half or in diagonal circles. Pass them through the beaten egg and grated bread and fry them in hot oil until golden. Remove with a skimmer and let it run on absorbent paper. Serve the meat and vegetable picadillo, decorated with parsley or coriander leaves, and accompanied with cooked rice and fried banana.

mint-chocolate-mousse-without-sugar-argi.name: Mint Chocolate Mousse Without Sugar

ingredients.item: 400 gr milk dessert or yogurt drained
400 gr milk dessert or yogurt drained

instructions: We're chopping up the couverture.
In a small pot, add the milk and add the couverture very finely chopped.
Add the fresh mint.
In low heat stirring, melt the chocolate.
Allow the chocolate to cool for 10 minutes
Remove the mint that has now left its aromas for the sugar-free mousse.
After the chocolate cools, add the milk dessert and mix with spatula to homogenize the mousse.
Add 1 or 2 tablespoons of honey depending on how sweet we want the mousse I personally don't put any sweetener in it.
Divide into 4 glasses and freeze the mousse in the refrigerator until it thickens for about 1 hour.
Serve the chocolate mousse without sugar always frozen with red fruits and mint chocolates.
They are one of the nicest and easy sweets to win impressions with few materials and even less time.

mixed-berry-french-toast.name: Mixed Berry French Toast
instructions: Whisk eggs, cinnamon, vanilla and milk together in medium-large bowl to create egg wash.
Dunk bread in egg wash.
Melt butter in a skillet on medium-low heat and cook bread for 2-3 minutes.
Mix berries, sugar, and lemon juice in medium pan over low heat crushing and stirring berries until they form a thick sauce.
Lay out slices and spread compote in between each slice then on top. Garnish with confectioners sugar (optional).
Enjoy!

mushroom-tortellini-alfredo.name: Mushroom Tortellini Alfredo

ingredients.item: Sea salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Fill a large pot with lightly salted water and bring to a rolling boil; stir in tortellini and return to a boil. Cook uncovered, stirring occasionally, until the tortellini float to the top and are tender yet firm to the bite, 2 to 3 minutes; do not overcook. Drain, reserving some pasta water.

Meanwhile, melt butter over medium heat in a large skillet. Add mushrooms, and saute until tender and golden brown, about 5 minutes. Reduce heat to low, pour in 1 1/2 cups of cream, and simmer, stirring occasionally, 4 to 5 minutes.

Remove the skillet from the heat and add drained tortellini; toss to combine. Stir in remaining 1/2 cup of heavy cream, 1 1/2 cups Parmesan cheese, lemon zest, nutmeg, sea salt, and pepper; toss until well incorporated.
Place the skillet over low heat and cook until Parmesan has melted and sauce has thickened slightly, 1 to 2 remaining Parmesan and parsley.

mushrooms-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Mushrooms In The Oven
instructions: Place anti-stick paper on a small baking pan and spread the sides over a layer.
Season with some olive oil, salt and pepper and rub with a brush to oil.
Sprinkle with some fresh thyme.
Bake in a well preheated evening at 200°C, on the medium grill, for 15 minutes.
Meanwhile, we're preparing the sweet spicy tahini: Add the garlic, salt, lemon juice and honey to the bowl.
We grind them until the garlic is crushed.
Add the tahini, water, turmeric and hot pepper and work a little more on the blender to homogenize.
Dilute the sauce with some water.
We control the flavors for the intensity of the materials and correct depending on how we prefer it, sour, sweet or spicy.
Once the ribs are removed from the oven, pour them while they are warm, with the sweet, hot tahini.
Sprinkle with the coarsely chopped hazelnuts and the chopped fresh onion.
Serve the mushrooms warm or at room temperature.

25-minute-mussels-in-white-wine.name: 25-minute Mussels In White Wine
instructions: To clean mussels, scrub them with a stiff brush under cold running water to remove any grit. Discard any mussels with cracked or broken shells, or that do not close.
In a large lidded pot over medium-high heat, stir butter until melted. Add the onion and cook, stirring frequently, until it has softened and started to brown, 6-8 minutes.
Add the garlic and cook for 30 seconds, stirring constantly.
Add the red pepper flakes and season with salt. Stir to combine.
Add the mussels and stir until completely coated. Add the white wine and stir.
Put the lid on the pot and cook until the mussels have opened, 3-5 minutes. Discard any shells that don’t open after 5 minutes.
Add the parsley and stir. Serve with bread.
Enjoy!
